app.name: DevFolio
home.loadError: Portfolio content could not be loaded.
home.heroText: Modern products with clean UI and fast interaction.
home.aboutFeature1Text: Create polished UI that feels intuitive and confident.
home.aboutFeature2Text: Build reliable apps with clean code and solid performance.
home.aboutFeature3Text: Ship solutions that solve real user problems.
home.contactCardMessage: Reach out by email for freelance work or new collaboration.
home.followMessage: Connect through GitHub or LinkedIn for lasting updates.
login.title: DevFolio CMS
login.description: Sign in to the admin panel
login.heroTitle: Manage your portfolio without leaving the flow.
login.heroDescription: A focused CMS workspace for projects, skills, career history, and profile content.
login.featureContentText: Keep every portfolio section consistent and ready to publish.
login.featureSecureText: Sign in once and move through each management screen quickly.
login.helperText: Use your admin credentials to continue.
dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
dashboard.description: Manage portfolio content quickly and safely from one place.
dashboard.projectsDescription: Add, sort, and unpublish portfolio projects.
dashboard.skillsDescription: Manage technical skills by category and level.
dashboard.experiencesDescription: Update career history and current roles.
dashboard.profileDescription: Edit personal details, social links, and CV file.
dashboard.nextStepsDescription: Small checks that keep the portfolio polished.
dashboard.nextStepProjects: Review project ordering before publishing new work.
dashboard.nextStepProfile: Keep profile links and CV aligned with the latest version.
dashboard.nextStepReview: Scan the public portfolio after each content update.
